programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After meeting a man from a dating app, a single mother goes missing; mobile Homicide presses the suspect to reveal her whereabouts; as the trial approaches, the public defender mounts a possible case of insanity by intoxication, but the prosecutor promises to find justice for the victim's family.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: After the unusual death of a local businessman, police become suspicious of his disgruntled wife, whose strange behavior and statements make her the prime suspect in the shooting.

programme.title: Killer Investigations
programme.desc: 19-year-old Milwaukee resident Sade Robinson was reported missing when she didn't show up for work one day; when a woman's severed leg washed up on the shores of Lake Michigan, locals feared there might be another Jeffrey Dahmer on the loose.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene shows up in Orange, declaring himself the king, while Dusty isn't quite ready to concede the title; Kenny accidentally reinvents the wheel; Lisa sees things from a slightly different perspective.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, a friendly duel runs Dusty up, but his vinyl might save him; Ivy's locker shines some light on the business; Lisa learns that she needs her locker about as much as she needs a hole in her head.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry utilizes a little-known tactic to snatch up a locker, and it ties him up in knots; Brandi shops in the bargain basement but puts on quite a show in the process; Ivy lands a large unit, and the tools stack right up.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.desc: In West Covina, Brandi makes a serious land grab, and it pays off handsomely; Rene can't resist the mystery of a good safe; Kenny can't seem to satisfy his hunger; Barry takes an opportunity to poach from the competition.
